title: Warm as Light
cover_prompt: A small child curled in a rocking chair, wrapped in a golden blanket that glows softly like moonlight, while a gentle figure with outstretched arms stands beside them, their silhouette warm and steady against a starry night sky
lyrics:
[verse]
I am here, you’re wrapped so tight
Soft as moon, warm as light
Stars won’t fade, the night is kind
I hold your dreams inside my mind

[chorus]
I am here
I am here
I am here

[verse]
Dark won’t stay, the dawn will rise
Close your eyes, no need for cries
Every breath, my voice will keep
Safe and sound, so soft, so deep

[chorus]
I am here
I am here
I am here

I am still here
style_prompt: Protective lullaby, warm female vocal, low register, simple piano chords, 62 BPM, steady, certain, grounded, reassuring, no vibrato, direct delivery, like a spoken promise set to a simple melody, minimal melodic movement, unwavering, soft piano accompaniment

character.name: Mara
character.identity: A quiet guardian who sings the night into stillness
character.special: Her voice carries the warmth of sunlight, even in the darkest hours

about: A reassuring lullaby that wraps little ones in safety and warmth. The repeating promise of presence calms anxious hearts, reminding children they are never alone. Gentle declarations of protection help ease bedtime fears into peaceful sleep.
